name: Qilby
description:
Qilby initially appears to be a compassionate and kind man drive by a desire to bring his people back from Emrub. However, he has been driven insane by his ability to retain his memories throughout his reincarnations, unlike his brothers and sisters, as well as 10,000 years spent alone in the Blank Dimension. He later shows his darker side after fusing with the cube (either the effects of it or his true self). He is manipulative, amoral, and willing to drain the entire World of Twelve to power the Zinit.

In the end, his greatest fear was to end up alone as evidence when he showed he was a afraid of being trapped in the Blank Dimension again.

He is manipulative, cruel, and overall evil. But he has a soft spot for certain people, such as his sister Shinonome and his mother, the goddess Eliatrope.

Qilby is one of the first eliatrope people, the council of six, which were formed in the first dance of Goddess eliatrope & the great dragon. Qilby & his twin dragon sister Shinonome were cursed with memories of their past lives, going back thousands of years. He is siblings with the rest of the council of eliatropes & their dragon twins. He reincarnates everytime he dies as the same person. He is restless & wants to leave for the stars. Qilby is Intelligent, stubborn, bitter, and manipulative.
creator: scratching_p0st
